_meta.author: dhileepkumargm
_meta.title: Digital Glitch
_meta.description:
"Digital Glitch" effect, reminiscent of retro CRT monitors and cyberpunk visuals. It moves away from the previous organic noise to a more geometric and distorted style. I've built it with the same high-quality, performant structure as before.

You now have controls for Glitch Intensity, RGB Shift, and Scanline Density, along with new presets like "Damaged VCR" and "Cyberpunk" to showcase the different effects you can create.
